tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
mac access-list extended BLOCK_COMPROMISED
 deny host 0242.de21.2100 any
 permit any any
exit
interface Gi0/1
 mac access-group BLOCK_COMPROMISED in
exit
end
write memory
show mac access-list"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
enable
Switch#configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.
Switch(config)#mac access-list extended BLOCK_COMPROMISED
Switch(config-ext-macl)# deny host 0242.de21.2100 any
Switch(config-ext-macl)# permit any any
Switch(config-ext-macl)#exit
Switch(config)#interface Gi0/1
Switch(config-if)# mac access-group BLOCK_COMPROMISED in
Switch(config-if)#exit
Switch(config)#end
Switch#write memory
